## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] My commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/).
- [ ] `pnpm lint`, `pnpm format:check` and `pnpm build` pass locally.
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check`, `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` and `cargo test` pass locally.
- [ ] I have added or updated tests where appropriate.
- [ ] I have updated documentation (README, CHANGELOG, etc.) where appropriate.
